task_description: Build the complete ChronAI project scaffold - a full-stack AI-powered productivity companion with a living particle UI entity, FastAPI backend with Gemini-powered agents, and MCP servers for Google service integrations.

verification.summary: Frontend builds successfully with pnpm (Next.js generates all pages). All Python files (backend + MCP servers) pass py_compile. docker-compose.yml validates as proper YAML. No tests to run (greenfield project - no test suite yet).
